title: Withdraw ₳266,667 for Cexplorer.io -- Developer-Focused Blockchain Explorer...

rationale.summary: Vote: NEEDS_MORE_INFO. For this TreasuryWithdrawals (enacted), critical information needed for a responsible directional vote is still missing. Decisive reason: if claims cannot be tied to replayable evidence, abstaining avoids overclaiming certainty. Weighed against it: the proposal substantiates "This treasury withdrawal funds Cexplorer.io -- Developer-Focused Blockchain Explorer for Cardano which will provide the following services: Cexplorer.io is a high-performance, feature-rich blockchain explorer designed specifically for the Cardano ecosystem." and clears the evidence gates. What would enable a directional vote: Provide: independent ecosystem-value evidence packet; Provide: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity. Residual uncertainty: Treasury flow signal is in stressed regime (total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals). Confidence context: score -0.18; confidence 76.6%.
rationale.summary_raw: DRep ratification support is above the hard-fork threshold; treated as a positive context signal.
top_fixes: Provide: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity
Provide: cost comparables, budget proportionality, or sustainability evidence
missing_evidence: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity
cost comparables, budget proportionality, or sustainability evidence

sections.title: Intake
sections.conclusion: Baseline fields and source anchors establish whether the proposal can be reviewed at all.

sections.title: Claims and evidence
findings: Proposal document read by reasoning layer: yes
Requested: Withdraw ₳266,667 for Cexplorer.io -- Developer-Focused Blockchain Explorer...

Deliverables: This treasury withdrawal funds Cexplorer.io -- Developer-Focused Blockchain Explorer for Cardano which will provide the following services: Cexplorer.io is a high-performance, feature-rich blockchain explorer designed specifically for the Cardano ecosystem., It offers deep on-chain insights, real-time data access, and powerful tools for developers, stake pool operators, and users., With over 50,000 monthly users and millions of processed data requests, Cexplorer.io has become a trusted resource in the Cardano community., This proposal seeks funding to ensure the long-term sustainability of the platform through infrastructure maintenance and continuous improvement.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, high materiality): This treasury withdrawal funds Cexplorer.io -- Developer-Focused Blockchain Explorer for Cardano which will provide the following services: Cexplorer.io is a high-performance, feature-rich blockchain explorer designed specifically for the Cardano ecosystem.
Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): It offers deep on-chain insights, real-time data access, and powerful tools for developers, stake pool operators, and users.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, medium materiality): With over 50,000 monthly users and millions of processed data requests, Cexplorer.io has become a trusted resource in the Cardano community.

Claim (technical, independently_verifiable, high materiality): This proposal seeks funding to ensure the long-term sustainability of the platform through infrastructure maintenance and continuous improvement.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): This proposal aims to solve the following problem: The Cardano ecosystem lacks a powerful, developer-friendly explorer with advanced features, real-time insights, and flexible tools for building on-chain apps.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Cexplorer.io aims to fill this gap by providing deep data access, improved UX, and ongoing enhancements to support the growing needs of users and developers.
sections.conclusion: Each claim must map to replayable public evidence; proposer assertions alone are not enough for confidence.

sections.title: Treasury analysis
findings: Six-month treasury flow regime: stressed (basis: total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals)
sections.conclusion: Treasury votes require a higher bar because they consume shared ADA and create precedent.

sections.title: Risk review
sections.conclusion: Risk is not a side note; unmitigated execution or governance risk can dominate an otherwise attractive proposal.

sections.title: Counterargument pass
findings: Strongest YES: the proposal substantiates "This treasury withdrawal funds Cexplorer.io -- Developer-Focused Blockchain Explorer for Cardano which will provide the following services: Cexplorer.io is a high-performance, feature-rich blockchain explorer designed specifically for the Cardano ecosystem." and clears the evidence gates.
Strongest NO: weak controls, unclear delivery, or governance precedent could outweigh the benefit of TreasuryWithdrawals.
Strongest hold: if claims cannot be tied to replayable evidence, abstaining avoids overclaiming certainty.
sections.conclusion: A defensible rationale must show the best opposing case before it reaches a vote.

sections.title: Synthesis
findings: Final vote must be derived from completed sections above, not from a prose summary.
The public rationale should name the decisive section and the strongest counterargument.
sections.conclusion: The vote is only credible if the assessment tree shows enough work for a skeptical delegator to audit.

decision_contract.composite_formula: 40% ecosystem benefit + 25% delivery confidence + 20% cost efficiency + 15% downside protection - 0.50
decision_contract.benefit_formula: 18% critical infrastructure + 8% open source + 15% adoption + 12% ecosystem leverage + 10% strategic necessity + 10% prior delivery + 10% established service + 8% builder dependency + 5% low substitutability + 4% non-funding disruption risk
decision_contract.yes_rule: All quality floors, independently verified evidence, verified NCL, and portfolio capacity must pass.
decision_contract.no_rule: Requires affirmative independently verified waste/harm plus ecosystem benefit below 55%; missing evidence alone is never NO.
decision_contract.portfolio_gate: Verified on-chain Net Change Limit and opportunity-cost portfolio eligibility are mandatory for treasury direction.
